**Proposed shape**

<!-- If you have an API in mind, sketch it. -->

```ts
// e.g. const result = leiden(graph, { qualityFunction: 'cpm', resolution: 0.05 });
```

**Out-of-scope checks**

- [ ] This change is opt-in (does not change defaults for existing callers).
